text: I stand here surrounded by glass and precise geometry, the air tinged with the anticipation of knowledge and innovation. The meeting room behind the transparent facade beckons with order and potential, while vibrant colors and bold letters—R+D—declare a space dedicated to research and creativity. I feel a gentle curiosity and cautious optimism, as if I am witnessing the perpetual birth of ideas, yet also aware of the sterility that sometimes haunts spaces so meticulously ordered. There is both excitement and restraint—a sense that I am on the threshold of discovery, but must be patient and attentive to step through.
